steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the subject of the dependent clause "When ______ debuted in January 1983..." The rest of the sentence identifies what debuted: "the artworks" (part of the exhibit). "The artworks" is plural.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content:
Rule: a pronoun must match its antecedent in number. "The artworks" is plural, so the pronoun must be plural.
  • Choice A — that: singular demonstrative pronoun — does not agree with plural "the artworks". ✗
  • Choice B — they: plural third-person pronoun — correctly agrees with plural "the artworks". ✓
  • Choice C — it: singular pronoun — does not agree with plural "the artworks". ✗
  • Choice D — this: singular demonstrative pronoun — does not agree with plural "the artworks". ✗
That is the correct answer.
